label: Neon Monkey Guard
description: Build neon monkey towers with the mouse to stop waves of bloons from reaching your base.

label: Fold Stitch Defense
description: A neon tower defense where you place towers, launch waves, and draw temporary fold traps while moving a blocker unit.

label: Neon Seam Guard
description: A neon hybrid-control tower defense where you build specialized seam towers and manually repair fabric stress between waves.

label: Seam Node Defense
description: Defend a neon seam by building towers, repairing integrity, and stopping waves from reaching the core.
